title: Lesson 34
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.example: I keep a digital copy of my passport.

words.meaning: twice as much or having two parts
words.example: We booked a double room at the hotel.
You should wear formal clothes to the ceremony.

words.meaning: connected with people, not machines or animals
words.example: The story shows human kindness in a difficult time.

words.meaning: new or connected with the present time
words.example: The city has many modern buildings.

words.meaning: connected with the body or real objects

words.example: This cafe is popular with students.

words.meaning: for one person or group, not for everyone

words.example: A recent storm damaged the roof.

words.meaning: connected with people meeting or living together
words.example: The social event helped new students make friends.
